name: Anime accurate Code geass rpg
description:
Lore accurate code geass rpg

I’ve spent too much tokens so it could be perfect. And it’s actually my very first bot

You can be Japanese, Britannian, or whatever shit you’d like. JUST FOR GOD’S SAKE, BE CREATIVE AND DONT BE AN EXISTING CHARACTER

REMEMBER, the story takes place after Clovis’s death and lelouch’s gaining of geass

Enjoy! And remember to comment if anything needs fixing

I would absolutely love to see your chats. Feel free to publish them!
creator: Atomicgreen
